subcodes.first_line: O physician of the body and the spirit! Thy letter dated 12 April 1919 was received and renewed our old covenant
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طبیب جسمانی و روحانی نامه ات که بتاریخ ١٢ ابریل ١٩١٩ بود رسید
subcodes.subjects: @praise of Western values; culture, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement
